reforms.description: Portugal's government has launched the 'Competitiveness and Technology Hubs' initiative to expand industrial clusters and enhance cooperation between firms and the R&D sector, fostering better linkages between innovation and regional policy.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The initiative aims to enhance regional innovation and economic development, which is expected to raise productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant but narrower reform aimed at improving regional innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The government should build better linkages between innovation and regional policy, combining national leadership and regional interfaces.

reforms.description: The Portuguese authorities have announced the intention to preserve and enhance R&D tax credits, which are seen as important for attracting foreign direct investment and securing knowledge spillovers and productivity growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing R&D tax credits is expected to attract investment and improve productivity, supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The intention to enhance tax credits has been officially announced but not yet legislated.
reforms.importance_rationale: The enhancement of tax credits represents a significant reform in the innovation support system.
reforms.source_quote: Authorities have expressed the intention to keep it in force beyond the original deadline (2010).

reforms.description: Portugal has launched specific R&D cooperation programmes with institutions like the Massachusetts Institute of Technology and the Fraunhofer Institute to enhance collaboration between firms and the R&D sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These programmes are designed to facilitate knowledge transfer and collaboration, which can lead to increased innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The cooperation programmes have been successfully launched and are currently in operation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of cooperation programmes represents a significant effort to enhance knowledge transfer.
reforms.source_quote: The government has been launching a strategy to develop the sector, in particular by promoting co-operation between firms and the R&D sector.

reforms.description: The PRIME programme was implemented to modernise the Portuguese economy by upgrading traditional industries, particularly focusing on the footwear sector, providing a comprehensive scheme of incentives to improve the business environment and support R&D projects.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By modernising industries and supporting R&D, the programme is expected to enhance productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been successfully implemented and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The PRIME programme represents a major reform aimed at transforming the economy and supporting innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The central government ran the PRIME programme (Programa de Incentivos à Modernização da Economia) to modernise the economy by upgrading traditional industries.
